name: LEMON
description: Fresh and sparkling iced tea with sun-ripened lemons
details: A refreshing classic with the perfect balance of sweet and sour. Our lemon variety embodies summer in every bottle.
longDescription: Our lemon iced tea combines the tangy freshness of Mediterranean lemons with the timeless elegance of oriental tea culture - a touch of Arabia in every sip.

name: PEACH
description: Velvety iced tea with juicy peaches
details: Like a summer's day in a glass - our peach iced tea combines the natural sweetness of ripe peaches with refreshing coolness.
longDescription: Our peach iced tea captures the essence of sun-drenched orchards, delivering a velvety smooth experience that balances delicate sweetness with a crisp, refreshing finish.
